transcript.text:
Hello everyone~
I have spicy rice cake and Korean hot dogs (corn dogs)
It's been a while
The rosé yupdduk is really popular these days
Is it not?
It's a simple mukbang because it's still daytime
I will have to eat dinner later too
Bon appetit
It's my first time trying this flavor Let's see
Wait a min..
The cheese won't cut
I ordered bacon toppings
I almost forgot
Wait, I need to try it again
It's a sausage link
Such a waste to eat it at once

It tastes good
This has been in trend
It's tasty
It has a kick to it
It's just a creamy version of it
It tastes good
I prefer this over the original one
I don't know which one this is
Don't they usually label it on the stick?
Dip it in the rosé sauce
This one is the rice cake one
I got 1 order of bacon toppings, but they give you a lot
It's not cheese, it's rice cake
What is this?
I thought it was a wooden chopstick for a sec
Potato

That cheese pull
Yum
[Chat: Watching your stream from school] Don't do that
Pay attention in class
I shouldn't be the one saying that
Rosé Spicy Rice Cake tastes good
I think it tastes better than the original one
Really tasty
The cheddar cheese one is my favorite
I like the mozzarella one too, but cheddar cheese is the best
Is it supposed to be this chewy?
[Chat: You look like a Tasha Mushroom (snack)]
Let's get some bacon
And rice cake
Wrap it up
Yum

[Chat: It's been 2 years since I had Myungrang hotdog] It tastes great
Cheddar cheese is so good
[Chat: Yupdduk Rosé vs Baedduk Rosé]
Yupdduk keeps the spicy rice cake base
But Baedduk has a very strange taste Although both are similar
Baedduk Rosé is more filling texture-wise
It's all personal preference
These are too chewy for some reason
There are 2 mozzarellas in here
[Chat: The food looks too tough to eat] Right?
[Chat: Can I have some?]
Say "ah"
There are more times I don't wear glasses
[Chat: You look mischievious] Do I?
Should I cut it so you can see?
[Chat: You'd have to eat everything if you cut it]

When have I not eaten it all?
Jingu
Come here
Some people still don't know I have cats
Too distracted by the food
Do I have a cold? It's probably from the spiciness
It's a bit spicy
Why's this one so big?
It's huge
Cheddar cheese
My cat
He follows me everywhere
Someone is always home
But I can't always be with him because of work
So I feel bad about that
I have 2, so they play with each other

1 would do a hit and run
Then they keep going back and forth
I have 2 ninja cats
They're super fast
Rosé spicy rice cake is good
It's starting to taste like the original one
I tasted a strong taste of the rosé flavor in the beginning
But the more I eat, the more it gets closer to the original spicy rice cake
[Chat: What's your #1 spicy rice cake?] Garden Bunsik (Her restaurant)
Are you kidding me?
I can now say that I like Baedduk more
This tastes good too, but
I'm trying to think of the best rosé rice cake
Mashin! (brand) That was the best
I have to go eat after this mukbang
The cheese isn't as good because it's cold

This is a non-spicy level
I'm not good at eating spicy food
It's still a little spicy
[Chat: Yay!] Yay!?
It's not like "omg it's spicy", But it's lingering
Spicy
I'm sleepy
I'm trying hard to keep my eyes open
I have a runny nose
Why am I so sleepy?
I hate cabbage
What's this?
I hate cabbage
I will end it here
Thanks everyone~ I finished everything
Thanks everyone~ [Subtitles by Hyun Choi] [antharoni@gmail.com]
